name: C2xGetThisData
title: C2xGetThisData
syntax: long C2xGetThisData( long offset, long bufferSize, byte buffer[] );
description: This function gets the payload data of the highest interpretable protocol.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Byte offset relative to the beginning of the payload
